spaceId.title: Space ID
spaceId.description: The ID for the Contentful space

ContentDeliveryaccessToken.title: Content Delivery API Access Token
ContentDeliveryaccessToken.description: Access token that has access to the space. Can be left empty if only Delivery API should be used.

ContentPreviewaccessToken.title: Content Preview API Access Token
ContentPreviewaccessToken.description: Access token that has access to the space. Can be left empty if only Preview API should be used.
